aesthetic_vibe: Linear meets Runway meets a video editor timeline aesthetic. Powerful, technical, and creative. Dense data but with structural whitespace.

mono.usage: Logs, timecodes, IDs, badges, data metrics

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The Control Room Grid (Dense, Data Correlation) combined with structural whitespace via surface elevation.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 fixed, L-shape global chrome, border-r border-white/10, bg-[#0A0A0A]
layout_and_spacing.gaps: gap-4 to gap-6 for tight data correlation
layout_and_spacing.padding: p-6 or p-8 inside cards to avoid collision with borders
layout_and_spacing.borderRadius: rounded-lg (8px) for cards, rounded-md (6px) for buttons/inputs

components.cards: Flat background (bg-[#121212]), hairline border (border border-white/10), no shadows. Hover state: slight lift or border brighten.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#FF5045] rounded-md font-medium transition-colors border border-transparent
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-md transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-md text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30] focus:border-[#FF3B30]
components.badges: rounded-sm px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-gray-300
components.terminal: bg-black border border-white/10 p-4 font-mono text-xs text-gray-400 rounded-lg overflow-y-auto
components.table: Compact density, flat rows, hover:bg-white/5, border-b border-white/10

motion.hover: Fast transitions (150ms) for opacity and border colors
motion.loaders: Minimalist spinning mono characters or progress bars, not heavy spinners

specific_page_guidelines.dashboard: Top level metrics using 'Control Room' grid. Shows total scenes, generated images, generated videos, render status. Use big mono typography for numbers.
specific_page_guidelines.scenes_list: Data table showing Airtable rows. Status badges (e.g. 'Pending Image', 'Video Ready') using mono font. Include a thumbnail if image generated.
specific_page_guidelines.image_gallery: 4-column masonry grid. Images must have group-hover effect revealing a checkbox to select for video gen. Checkboxes should be prominently placed at top-left of image overlay. Dark gradient overlay on hover so checkbox is visible.
specific_page_guidelines.remotion_render: Split view: Left side configuration (composition selector, resolution, start button), Right side black terminal window (bg-black) for live logs with monospace font.
specific_page_guidelines.settings_login: One-time browser login page with noVNC iframe embed for capturing Google Flow / Grok cookies. Needs a full-width dense layout.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast on surface backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testids: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, checkboxes, tabs). Use kebab-case.
